form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of three-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign seventh of 10 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 December 26 over 1000m, 3 len behind Runlikenencryption with 56kg at $7.50. Previously first up; sixth of 12 at Moonee Valley Bm74 October 24 over 955m, 3 len behind Gin A Tonic with 59kg at $15. Can feature first-up as he brings in Victorian form.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign won by long-neck this track Cl2 October 19 over 1100m defeating Blitzem Babe carrying 58.5kg at $1.24. Previous preparation first-up favourite; to post a big 4.5 len win. This track Mdn September 21 over 1200m defeating Vain Universe carrying 58kg at $1.20. Very impressive last campaign and can pick up from where she left off.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign sixth of 10 at Esperance Cl5 January 2 over 1100m, 3 len behind Oregon Hiker with 56.5kg at $5.50. Previously first up; second last of 8 at this track Cl2 May 3 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Floba carrying 57.5kg at $8.50. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on April 3 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Marines Cry carrying 57.5kg at $26. The race before that second last of 12 at Albany Rtg 58+ on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 10 len behind God Has Drifted carrying 56.5kg at $26. Won't be far away.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation when last of 7 at this track Rtg 58+ October 19 over 1400m, 9 len behind Just Famous with 56.5kg at $41. First up last campaign fourth in a small field at this track Rtg 58+ April 5 2025 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Natural Gem carrying 58kg at $20. Plenty of more attractive propositions in this race.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign fourth of 7 at this track Rtg 58+ October 19 over 1400m, 7 len behind Just Famous with 56.5kg at $9. When resuming last campaign ninth of 11 at Pinjarra Scarpside Grad Hcp 58+ August 2 over 1200m, in the wet; 5.5 len behind Spectacular Park with 57.5kg at $18. Nice draw on resumption and she can put her best foot forward.
